import React from 'react'; const card = { background: 'var(--card)', border: '1px solid var(--border)', borderRadius: 14, padding: '1.5rem', textAlign: 'center', }; const members = [ { initials: 'DM', name: 'Darshan Malini Padmanabhan', role: 'Hardware & Drone Systems', color: '#f5a623' }, { initials: 'GR', name: 'GMS Rajkumar', role: 'Programming & ML', color: '#e8522a' }, { initials: 'DS', name: 'Deeksha Santhakumar', role: 'Design & Presentation', color: '#00d4aa' }, { initials: 'AG', name: 'Aaruthra Gandhi', role: 'Research & Communication', color: '#7c6fff' }, ]; export default function About() { return (
{/* HEADER */}
WHO WE ARE

ABOUT US

This solution is brought to you by four young innovators who aim to transform the roads of today and make them safer for tomorrow. Darshan Malini Padmanabhan, GMS Rajkumar, Deeksha Santhakumar, and Aaruthra Gandhi came together with a shared vision of solving real-world problems through technology. Combining skills in hardware, programming, design, and presentation, the team worked collaboratively to develop an AI-powered drone system for pothole detection and geotagging.

{/* TEAM CARDS */}
{members.map(m => (
{m.initials}
{m.name}
{m.role}
))}
{/* MISSION BLOCK */}
OUR MISSION

We are students from Hosur, Tamil Nadu — a city where potholes are a daily reality. We decided to stop complaining and start building. From soldering our first circuit to competing at nationals, this project is proof that young innovators can create real solutions to real problems.

{['🥉 3rd Prize – Codeavour 7.0', '🏛 Nationals – Delhi', '🤖 Universal Robo League'].map(a => ( {a} ))}
{/* CONTACT */}
CONTACT US
{[ { icon: '✉️', label: 'Email', value: 'pothole.detection.clan@gmail.com' }, { icon: '📞', label: 'Phone', value: '+91 XXXXX XXXXX' }, { icon: '📸', label: 'Instagram', value: '@pothole_detection_clan' }, { icon: '👤', label: 'Facebook', value: 'Pothole Detection Clan' }, ].map(c => (
{c.icon}
{c.label}
{c.value}
))}
